title: Grammy Awards 2026 Predictions: Record of the Year
text: The 2026 Grammy Awards ceremony takes place February 1, with Record of the Year recognizing "excellence in the finished recording" focusing on "performance, production, arrangement, and engineering." The eight nominees are: Lady Gaga - "Abracadabra", Bad Bunny - "DtMF", Sabrina Carpenter - "Manchild", ROSÉ & Bruno Mars - "APT.", Kendrick Lamar & SZA - "Luther", Billie Eilish - "Wildflower", Chappell Roan - "The Subway", Doechii - "Anxiety". InMusic forecasts Lady Gaga's "Abracadabra" as the winner. The track features production by Cirkut, Lady Gaga, and Andrew Watt, with mixing by Bryce Bordone, Serban Ghenea, and Paul LaMalfa. The publication describes the song as delivering "a bold, cinematic soundscape that feels deliberately maximalist and meticulously crafted." Significantly, this would mark Gaga's first Record of the Year victory despite her extensive Grammy history. Strong Contenders: "Luther" (Kendrick Lamar & SZA) - Called Gaga's "strongest challenger," featuring refined production from the album GNX. "APT." (ROSÉ & Bruno Mars) - Praised for its "pop-funk craftsmanship" and "radio-ready mix".
